text:
There once was a cat who lived inside a tree. She loved looking out into the forest every day, watching birds fly. One day, she saw a tiny goldfinch zoom towards a branch.

"Maybe it's my pal?" she thought.

Every day, she watched the goldfinch. She wanted to join its fun.

One day, they were playing war. The cat flew down and landed right on the goldfinch's head!

"Hello!" she laughed.

A little while later, they were flying side by side.

"We're just like little birds, you know," she said.

She started calling the goldfinch Fluffy.

Later that year, Fluffy laid dozens of eggs. The cat sat next to them all day. Finally, one tiny chick fluttered down.

"Well, I guess we're family now?"

Yes, Fluffy was a gorgeous goldfinch. They stayed close, watching each other from a branch.
